cedict_en: variant of 曳[ye4] | to throw/to fling | self-satisfied; cocky (alternative written form of 跩[zhuai3]) | to pull/to tug at (sth)
patent/sth uniquely enjoyed (or possessed etc) by a certain group of people/monopoly
specific topic (addressed by a book, lecture, TV program etc)/article, report or program etc on a specific topic
to shift; to relocate; to transfer/(fig.) to shift (attention); to change (the subject etc)/(medicine) to metastasize
